name: @contexted/api-worker
description: Contexted API worker for intake, matching, reveals, and chat

scripts.dev: npm run build --prefix ../../packages/shared && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node dist/apps/api-worker/src/dev-server.js
scripts.dev:test: npm run build --prefix ../../packages/shared && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --env-file=../../.env.test dist/apps/api-worker/src/dev-server.js
scripts.dev:prod: npm run build --prefix ../../packages/shared && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --env-file=../../.env.production dist/apps/api-worker/src/dev-server.js
